news.title: Starlink’s V5 dish is now available — here’s how it compares
news.summary: SpaceX's latest residential dish - the Starlink V5 - is now available in "select areas." It's notably smaller and lighter than the V4 dish with improved power efficiency. news.title: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week

news.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
